title: Foreign Exchange Turnover Data: April 13, 2026 – April 17, 2026
description: The Reserve Bank of India today released the data showing daily merchant and Inter-Bank transactions in foreign exchange for the period April 13, 2026 – April 17, 2026. All Figures are in USD Millions Position Date MERCHANT INTER BANK FCY / INR FCY / FCY FCY / INR FCY / FCY Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Swap Forward Spot Swap Forward Purchases 13-04-2026 5,711 1,381 1,126 348 244 178 13,806 25,975 1,350 5,888 3,108 356 15-04-2026 7,409 1,7
